Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-21-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Richard Meier, Esq. for Plaintiff: Max Smith and Fay Smith.
Tommy Lee, Esq. special appearance for Defendants: OK Investment Inc. and Homei Naimi.
Parties were sworn and direct examined.
Case settled, terms partially read into the record as follows:
Parties stipulated to a settlement in total of $130,000.00
$40,000.00 check given to Mr. Meier in open court, to be paid to the Lien Holder to released the lien.
Additional $30,000.00 to be paid on or before Jan. 31, 2006 and $60,000.00 on or before Feb. 28, 2006, in exchanged for a Dismissal with prejudice.
Seven pages and terms of stipulated Settlement Agreement signed by the parties, but not read into the record.
All understand and agreed to terms.
Matter is deemed settled, and placed on the CRC-225 calendar for Mar. 21, 2006 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212, for Dismissal.
